case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. YISROEL ZAETZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100131216) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
